name: 10-factor-html
title: 10-factor-html
summary: Improve HTML, landing pages, docs pages, static previews, and generated web pages for semantic structure, responsiveness, accessibility, SEO, performance, visual polish, and Agent handoff quality.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 10-factor-html skill to improve this HTML page for semantic structure, responsiveness, accessibility, SEO, performance, and visual polish.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
